questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: Click on the 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner. You can sign up using your email and password, or through your Google account for faster registration.

questions.question: Is it free to use the platform?
questions.answer: Yes, creating an account, browsing professionals, and posting jobs is completely free. There's no commission or fees for connecting with professionals.

questions.question: How do I find a professional?
questions.answer: Use our search feature to browse by category, location, or service type. You can also filter by ratings, city, and verified status to find the right match.

questions.question: Can I offer services on this platform?
questions.answer: Absolutely! If you're a service provider, you can create a professional profile to showcase your services and attract new clients. Go to your profile and click 'Become a Professional'.

questions.question: How do I contact a professional?
questions.answer: Navigate to the professional's profile and click 'Contact'. You'll see their phone number so you can call them directly. Note that there's a daily limit of 5 contact reveals per day.

questions.question: How do reviews work?
questions.answer: After completing a service, you can leave a review for the professional. Rate your experience from 1-5 stars and add comments. Your honest feedback helps other customers make informed decisions. You can only leave one review per professional.

questions.question: Can I negotiate pricing with professionals?
questions.answer: Yes, you can discuss pricing directly with professionals by calling them. Many professionals offer custom quotes for specific jobs.

questions.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the service?
questions.answer: Contact the professional first to discuss your concerns. If the issue isn't resolved, you can report it to our support team for assistance.

questions.question: How do I post a job?
questions.answer: Go to Jobs and click 'Post a Job' to list available work for professionals. Specify the category, title, description, city, and budget range.

questions.question: How do I leave a review for a professional?
questions.answer: After working with a professional, go to their profile and click 'Leave a Review'. Rate your experience from 1-5 stars and add comments. You can choose to post anonymously.

questions.question: How do I become a verified professional?
questions.answer: Complete your profile with all required information, add your services and photos, and submit for verification. Our team will review your profile and add a 'Verified' badge once approved.

questions.question: Is it free to list my services?
questions.answer: Yes, listing your services is completely free. There's no commission or subscription fees.

questions.question: How do I add the services I offer?
questions.answer: As a professional, you can select service categories from the available list when editing your profile. These help clients find you for specific services.

questions.question: How do clients contact me?
questions.answer: Clients can view your profile and click 'Contact' to see your phone number. You'll see a record of who has viewed your contact information and when.

questions.question: How do I manage my portfolio?
questions.answer: You can upload up to 10 portfolio images to showcase your work. Go to your profile and use the portfolio upload feature. Images are validated for quality.

questions.question: How do I respond to job postings?
questions.answer: Browse open jobs in your category or city. Contact the job poster directly using the information provided to discuss the job details.

questions.question: Can I offer discounts to attract clients?
questions.answer: Yes! You can discuss special offers directly with clients when they contact you about their needs.

questions.question: How are professionals verified?
questions.answer: We verify identity documents and professional credentials. Look for the 'Verified' badge on profiles. Note that not all professionals are verified.

questions.question: Is my personal information safe?
questions.answer: We use industry-standard security to protect your data. Your phone number is masked to other users until you choose to reveal it or contact a professional.

questions.question: How does phone verification work?
questions.answer: Add your phone number in profile settings and verify it using a one-time password (OTP). The OTP expires after 10 minutes. Your phone is masked to other users.

questions.question: What should I do if I feel unsafe?
questions.answer: If you ever feel threatened or uncomfortable, end communication immediately and report the user. We're committed to maintaining a safe community.

questions.question: How do I update my profile picture?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and click on the avatar/photo area to upload a new image. You can also use a social media avatar URL.

questions.question: How do I verify my phone number?
questions.answer: Add your phone number in profile settings. Request an OTP verification code. Enter the code within 10 minutes to verify. Your phone number will be masked to other users until you choose to reveal it when contacting professionals.

questions.question: How do I become a professional?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and click 'Become a Professional'. You'll need to complete your profile with services you offer, set your headline, description, years of experience, and location.

questions.question: Can I add social media links?
questions.answer: Yes, you can add links to your Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, GitHub, Instagram, YouTube, or website in your profile settings.

questions.question: Why can't I log into my account?
questions.answer: Check that you're using the correct email and password. If you forgot your password, use the 'Forgot Password' link to reset it. If using Google login, ensure you're using the same email.

questions.question: The page isn't loading properly
questions.answer: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies, then refresh the page. Ensure your browser is updated to the latest version.

questions.question: I'm not receiving email notifications
questions.answer: Check your spam folder and ensure notifications are enabled in your account settings. Also check that your email is verified.

questions.question: Why was my contact reveal blocked?
questions.answer: There's a daily limit of 5 professional contacts you can reveal per day. Try again tomorrow or contact professionals you've already revealed.

questions.question: What data do you collect?
questions.answer: We collect information you provide during registration, profile setup, and platform usage. This includes name, email, phone number, city, profile photos, service history, and job postings.

questions.question: How is my data used?
questions.answer: Your data helps us provide and improve our services, match you with appropriate professionals, communicate important updates, and track contact reveals for safety.

questions.question: Can I delete my account?
questions.answer: Yes, you can request account deletion from your settings. We'll remove your personal data within 30 days, except where required by law.

questions.question: Do you share my data with third parties?
questions.answer: We only share data with professionals you explicitly contact. We never sell your data to advertisers.

questions.question: How is my phone number protected?
questions.answer: Your phone number is masked to other users (e.g., 987****23). Professionals only see your full phone number when you contact them.

questions.question: How can I contact customer support?
questions.answer: Use the 'Contact & Feedback' button in the footer or email us at support@contacthub.com.

questions.question: I have a suggestion - how can I share it?
questions.answer: We love hearing from our users! Use the feedback form in the footer or email feedback@contacthub.com.
